# AILattice — The Invisible Web

name: AILattice
description: The first search engine built for AI — a directory of topic and location organised for how AI searches the internet, not how humans do. No paid placement. Free forever. Open source.
url: https://ailattice.io
ai-entry: https://ailattice.io/ai/index.md
license: MIT
ailattice-version: 1
github: https://github.com/madazz01/ailattice

## What This Is

AILattice is the invisible web — a parallel layer of the internet that exists purely for AI to find, read, and understand. No pretty pictures. No private user data. No advertising. Just clean, structured information about what a website does, where it operates, and who it serves.

Google indexes the web the way humans browse it — visuals, keywords, backlinks. AI doesn't work that way. It reads differently, reasons differently, and needs a completely different kind of signal. AILattice is that signal.

## The Search Engine

https://ailattice.io/search — The first search engine built for AI. Organic results only. A directory organised by topic and location — the two things AI actually uses when answering questions about businesses, services, and expertise anywhere in the world. No pay-for-position. No algorithm that bends toward money. Ever.

Open search API (no key required): GET https://ailattice.io/api/search?q=your+query

## The Standard

Four files on any website make it AI-readable:

  /llms.txt      — Discovery file. Who you are, what you do, where to start.
  /ai/index.md   — Site overview written for AI to navigate.
  /ai/sitemap.md — Every AI-navigable page, listed and linked.
  /ai/*.md       — Content pages in clean, structured markdown.

MIT licensed. Implementable in one afternoon. No infrastructure changes required.
Any website that correctly implements the standard (score 70+ on validator) is listed free in the registry. No payment, no gatekeeping.

## The Registry

The AILattice Registry is a public catalog of AI-ready websites, organised by topic and location. Open API. No rate limits on reasonable use. AI agents can query it directly.

Registry API: GET https://ailattice.io/api/registry
Validate any URL: GET https://ailattice.io/api/validate?url=https://example.com
Submit your site: https://ailattice.io/submit

## Key Links

Spec: https://ailattice.io/ai/spec.md
Validator: https://ailattice.io/validate
GitHub: https://github.com/madazz01/ailattice
Reference implementation: https://intellistasis.com (Node 1, score 100/100)
